chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1429 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 23.01.2024 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondent No.3/ Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassang, AAG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for Respondent No.3 / University has filed payment of schedule and submits that all the payments would be made to the petitioner as per schedule. This petition, therefore, in the above terms of schedule is disposed, failure of which, shall expose the defaulter to contempt proceedings. Judge Judge ARBROHI
